title: Memes: Food for Attitudes and Behavior Crucial for Our Survival.
journal_full: BioEssays : news and reviews in molecular, cellular and developmental biology
abstract: An effort is made to frame memes within a human evolutionary context in which memes are complex emotion-related tools of enhanced learning and spread of language, art, culture and technology. The basic idea is that any information can become a meme if emotions are evoked in a recipient. The evolution of human brain with memetic capabilities thus produced modern humans.
